mapper.insert: insert into nursing_level(name, lplan_id, fee, status, description, create_time, create_by, update_by, remark) values (#{name}, #{lplanId}, #{fee}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update nursing_level set name = #{name}, lplan_id = #{lplanId}, fee = #{fee}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select nl.*, np.plan_name, su.real_name from nursing_level nl left join nursing_plan np on nl.lplan_id = np.id left join sys_user su on nl.create_by = su.id
and nl.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and nl.status = #{status}
order by nl.id
select nl.*, np.plan_name, su.real_name from nursing_level nl left join nursing_plan np on nl.lplan_id = np.id left join sys_user su on nl.create_by = su.id where nl.id = #{id}
